scripts.patterns:analyze: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/analyze-patterns.mjs

scripts.vectors:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/build-episode-vectors.mjs
scripts.snapshots:backfill: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/backfill-prediction-snapshots.mjs
scripts.snapshots:evaluate: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/evaluate-predictions.mjs
scripts.summaries:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/summarize-days.mjs
